web_app.name: Web App (React + Flask)
web_app.description: Standard Single-Page App mit lokaler Datenbank

code_templates.basic_model:
from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
import datetime

db = SQLAlchemy()

class Item(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = db.Column(db.String(255), nullable=False)
    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)
code_templates.cli_entry_point:
import argparse

parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Your CLI Tool')
parser.add_argument('--name', required=True, help='Name parameter')
args = parser.parse_args()
print(f'Hello, {args.name}!')
